steps.title: Use the cause and effect
steps.content: The river slows when it reaches calmer ocean water. The next sentence says particles are deposited, so the blank must describe reduced velocity stopping or breaking off sediment suspension.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A would mean increasing the suspension. Choice B means hiding it, which does not fit the physical process. Choice D means speeding something up, the opposite of what reduced flow velocity does.

steps.title: Choose the stopping action
steps.content: Interrupting means stopping a process for a time, which matches the way slower flow causes suspended particles to fall out and form deposits. The answer is C.
